tools.name: get_executive_compensation
tools.description: Returns annual named-executive compensation rows for a company identified by ticker or CIK, with fiscal-year filters, pay components, totals, and filing source URLs. Latest-FY requests cost 0 credits; historical, range, or multi-FY requests require OAuth or X-API-KEY and cost 1 credit. Pay ratio, pa

tools.name: get_company_dossier
tools.description: Returns a sourced company dossier for a ticker, including executives, compensation history, pay ratio, pay-versus-performance, claims, and release provenance, with optional full or compact format and field projection. Requires OAuth or X-API-KEY and costs 3 credits. The result is filing evidence, no

tools.name: get_claim_evidence
tools.description: Returns the value, filing source, release identity, methodology version, and current or superseded status for a RentSeek `clm_...` claim ID. Requires OAuth or X-API-KEY and costs 1 credit. The result is filing evidence, not investment advice.

tools.name: list_material_changes
tools.description: Returns classified executive-compensation disclosure changes for 1-50 tickers since an inclusive date or timestamp, with configurable thresholds and cursor pagination. Requires OAuth or X-API-KEY and costs 2 credits per page. Current compensation snapshots and full historical rows are not included.

tools.name: list_available_tickers
tools.description: Returns ticker symbols for companies with published RentSeek executive-compensation data. No authentication is required, and the request costs 0 credits. The result contains availability only, not compensation values. It is not investment advice.
